steps.title: Set up the rate formula
steps.content:
To find average miles per day, divide total distance by total time:
$$\frac{1,950 \text{ miles}}{100 \text{ days}}$$

steps.title: Simplify the fraction
steps.content:
Divide both numerator and denominator to simplify:
$$\frac{1,950}{100} = \frac{195}{10} = \frac{39}{2} = 19.5$$
That matches Choice C — 19.5.
